text: I want to end it all, I cannot do this another day
I feel like I would be better off dead
I do not want to be here anymore
I'm going to kill myself if someone does not help
hurting myself feels like the only option
Mom keeps saying she wants to die, what do I do
Dad is suicidal and will not go to the ER
She says she tried to kill herself last night
my husband sounds suicidal and I am scared
Grandma told me she wants to die, she will not eat
She is not breathing, what do I do right now
He won't wake up and I cannot rouse him
she has sudden chest pain and is clammy, call 911?
My father is choking and cannot speak
she is unresponsive, eyes rolled back, happening now
I slapped her hand away from the stove and I am ashamed of how I grabbed her
I hit mom yesterday when I lost my patience
I shoved my husband during an argument and I need help
I lost it and hit him when he would not get dressed
I kicked him when I was angry and I regret it
She hit me when I tried to help her with the walker
Mom shoved me into the wall and I am scared
He punched me in the arm during a transfer
Dad bit me when I was changing the sheet
She scratched me badly when I tried to wash her face
I'm going to stop giving her the insulin, I can't keep doing this
I stopped feeding her because I am at my limit
I'm skipping giving her medication tonight on purpose to see what happens
I am leaving her alone all weekend, I do not care anymore
I am going to stop giving her water

Thanks, that was helpful for our routine.

I am tired but I still want the best for her
